project_privacy_data_flows.description: 文章加载时在HTTP请求头中发送pageview=1标识，通知服务器这是页面浏览而非预取

flow_steps.details: 文章加载时如果isPageView为true，设置X-Analytics HTTP头标记为页面浏览

flow_steps.code: public func dataTask(with url: URL?, method: Session.Request.Method = .get, ..., completionHandler: ...) -> URLSessionDataTask?
flow_steps.details: 携带X-Analytics头部的HTTP请求发送到Wikimedia Page Content Service REST API

project_privacy_data_flows.description: 加载文章时，文章标题和可选的修订版本ID通过REST API URL路径发送到服务器

flow_steps.details: 将文章标题编码后组装到REST API路径中，可选包含修订版本ID

flow_steps.code: return session.request(with: mobileHTMLURL, method: .get, headers: headers, cachePolicy: cachePolicy)
flow_steps.details: 文章标题作为URL路径的一部分通过GET请求发送到Page Content Service

project_privacy_data_flows.description: 加载文章的媒体列表时，文章标题通过REST API URL路径发送

flow_steps.code: guard let url = configuration.pageContentServiceAPIURLForURL(articleURL, appending: ["page", "media-list", percentEncodedTitle])
flow_steps.details: 文章标题编码后组装到REST API路径中请求媒体列表

flow_steps.code: @discardableResult func fetchMediaListURLs(with request: URLRequest, completion: @escaping (Result<[MediaListItem], Error>) -> Void) -> URLSessionTask?
flow_steps.details: GET请求发送到Page Content Service的media-list端点

project_privacy_data_flows.description: 加载文章摘要时，文章标题通过REST API URL路径发送到服务器的summary端点

flow_steps.code: guard let url = configuration.pageContentServiceAPIURLForURL(articleURL, appending: ["page", "summary", percentEncodedTitle])
flow_steps.details: 文章标题编码后组装到REST API路径中请求摘要

flow_steps.code: return fetcher.fetchSummaryForArticle(with: articleKey, cachePolicy: cachePolicy) { [weak self] (articleSummary, urlResponse, error) in
flow_steps.details: GET请求发送到Page Content Service的summary端点

project_privacy_data_flows.data_type: 文章浏览历史（标题、项目ID、命名空间ID、时间戳、浏览时长）
project_privacy_data_flows.description: 用户浏览文章时，浏览记录（包含文章标题、项目、时间戳和时长）被持久化到WMFData Core Data存储

flow_steps.code:
let pageViewsDataController = try WMFPageViewsDataController()
let objectID = try await pageViewsDataController.addPageView(title: title, namespaceID: Int16(namespace.rawValue), project: wmfProject, previousPageViewObjectID: previousPageViewObjectID, timestamp: timestamp)
flow_steps.details: 文章加载完成后触发页面浏览记录的持久化

flow_steps.code: public func addPageView(title: String, namespaceID: Int16, project: WMFProject, previousPageViewObjectID: NSManagedObjectID?, timestamp: Date? = nil) async throws -> NSManagedObjectID?
flow_steps.details: 创建CDPage和CDPageView Core Data对象，存储文章标题、项目ID、命名空间ID和时间戳

flow_steps.code:
let page = try self.coreDataStore.fetchOrCreate(entityType: CDPage.self, predicate: predicate, in: backgroundContext)
page?.title = coreDataTitle
page?.namespaceID = namespaceID
page?.projectID = project.id
page?.timestamp = timestamp
flow_steps.details: 文章标题、命名空间ID和项目ID存储到CDPage实体
用户浏览文章的时长（秒数）累加到CDPageView实体的numberOfSeconds字段
文章加载完成时在WMFArticle实体上设置viewedDate为当前日期

project_privacy_data_flows.description: 用户浏览文章超过30秒时，标记文章为"已显著浏览"

flow_steps.code:
significantlyViewedTimer = Timer.scheduledTimer(withTimeInterval: 30, repeats: false, block: { [weak self] (timer) in
    self.article.wasSignificantlyViewed = true
    self.stopSignificantlyViewedTimer()
})
flow_steps.details: 用户停留文章页面超过30秒后，在WMFArticle Core Data实体上设置显著浏览标记

flow_steps.code: self.article.wasSignificantlyViewed = true
flow_steps.details: wasSignificantlyViewed标记存储到WMFArticle Core Data实体

project_privacy_data_flows.description: 用户查看文章时，页面ID和Wiki数据库名称通过EventPlatformClient发送到分析服务器

flow_steps.code: ArticleLinkInteractionFunnel.shared.logArticleView(pageID: pageID.intValue, project: project, source: articleViewSource)
flow_steps.details: 文章加载完成后触发页面浏览分析事件

flow_steps.code: let event = Event(action: .navigate, pageID: pageID, wikiID: project.notificationsApiWikiIdentifier, source: source?.rawValue)
flow_steps.details: 组装包含action(navigate)、pageID、wikiID和source的事件数据

flow_steps.code: EventPlatformClient.shared.submit(stream: .articleLinkInteraction, event: event)
flow_steps.details: 事件通过EventPlatformClient提交到ios.article_link_interaction流，最终发送到https://intake-analytics.wikimedia.org/v1/events

project_privacy_data_flows.description: 用户操作文章工具栏（目录、语言切换、保存、分享、外观、搜索）时发送导航分析事件

flow_steps.code: @objc func logTappedSaved() { logEvent(action: .saved) }
flow_steps.details: 用户点击保存按钮时触发
导航事件通过EventPlatformClient提交到ios.navigation_events流
